title: Moonshine Still: Choose Your Cuts
strategies: uniform K-slice single-pass sell-everything (the checker's own trivial baseline)
single-pass revenue-maximizing DP over cut points, with a post-hoc purity threshold that reclassifies low-purity fractions as recycle

joint two-pass co-design: search over a quarantine window [lo,hi) in pass 1 that is deliberately NOT locally revenue-optimal, sized to concentrate the overlap into one clean recycle stream that pass 2 re-cuts near-losslessly, taking the better of this and the single-pass plan
